scripts.dev:api:d1: pnpm d1:bootstrap && cross-env pnpm --filter @nbins/api exec wrangler dev --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state --var D1_DRIVER:d1
scripts.d1:bootstrap: pnpm d1:gen && pnpm --filter @nbins/api exec node scripts/bootstrap-local-d1.mjs
scripts.qa: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test:api
